raw_text: My shirt is red
I am going to the store today
Remember the number six
I prefer red things
the game is missing a feature a luck feature
When we win, we get a chance to guess black or red. That is double the money or bust. or, we just decide to cash in and not guess to loose it all or double it all.

just modify the aplication , make it work. the feature should be there if not , BUIL IIT. if you do not have any type of access you tell me and i take care of it. You are the master of this operating system for the owner of the hardware m5mac here, me , the architect. love you

Done. Pushed 3c2340b → origin/main.

Tell ALICE the feature she couldn't build is live. Here's how it works:

WIN a hand → 🎰 "WON 0.40 STGM (two pair)! Guess RED or BLACK..."
  🔴 RED     → Flip card → ✅ 4♥ is RED! DOUBLED → 0.80 STGM — go again?
  🔴 RED     → Flip card → 💀 K♠ is BLACK! BUST — lost 0.80 STGM
  💰 CASH IN → 💰 Cashed in 0.80 STGM — smart move. Warren Buffett approves.
The flow: betting → dealt → drawn → gamble → (keep doubling or cash in) → betting

You can double as many times as y
ok, time for you to guess
ok, i will cash in this time. but get ready for next time i choose so i show you how.
can you tell that i helt the two 10's?
